content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Have a state of the art of advances in the field of Machine Learning and design of these models - Know how to implement these deep learning algorithms for different types of medical imaging data - Know how to evaluate the performance of these algorithms on a given problem and know the impact of different learning parameters
Contenu de la matière
Basics of Machine Learning in Cybersecurity
Time Series Analysis and Ensemble Modeling
Segregating Legitimate and Lousy URLs
Knocking Down CAPTCHAs
Using Data Science to Catch Email Fraud and Spam
Efficient Network Anomaly Detection Using K-Means
Decision Tree and Context-Based Malicious Event Detection
Catching Impersonators and Hackers Red-Handed
Change the Game with TensorFlow
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
Machine learning for Cybersecurity cookbook
James, G., Witten, D., Hastie, T., and Tibshirani, R.An introduction to statistical learning,
volume 112. Springer.
Hastie, T., Tibshirani, R., and Friedman, J, The Elements of Statistical Learning. Springer
